km.Chaumont-Sud, Chaumont, Haute-Marne, Cha: ឆាូមូនត-សូដ, ឆាូមូន់, ហាូតេ-មារនេ, ឆាម៉ា្គនេ-ារដេនណេ, ប្រទេសបារាំង

zh.Chaumont-Sud, Chaumont, Haute-Marne, Cha: 法國哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內豪蒙特豪蒙吉素德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Raoul I le Bouteiller Senlis Seigneur於1185年之後出生在法國哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內豪蒙特豪蒙吉素德時，他的父親Guy IV Senlis de France Bouteiller8839歲，母親Elisabeth de Trie8830歲。他於1205年之後與Jeanne de Rougemont結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1250年。

zh-hans.Chaumont-Sud, Chaumont, Haute-Marne, Cha: 法国哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內豪蒙特豪蒙吉素德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Raoul I le Bouteiller Senlis Seigneur于1185年之后出生在法国哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內豪蒙特豪蒙吉素德时，他的父亲Guy IV Senlis de France Bouteiller8839岁，母亲Elisabeth de Trie8830岁。他于1205年之后与Jeanne de Rougemont结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1250年。

nameMeanings.name: Senlis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Sales
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Efren, Alberto, Francisco, Manuel, Camilo, Carlos, Fernando, Juan, Juanita, Mario, Ofelia.

English: variant of Sale with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. The Middle English plural form was probably often in variation with the singular form. The surname is uncommon in southwestern England but may derive there from Zeals (Wiltshire), and also from the plural form of Old English sealh ‘willow’; see Seal .
Catalan, Spanish, and French (Occitan): habitational name from any of the places called Sales, like Sales de Llierca (Catalonia), from the plural of   Sala   1. Compare   De Sales  .

nameMeanings.name: Raoul
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Bouteiller
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: occupational name for a wine steward or butler, usually the chief servant of a medieval household, or for a maker of bottles, from bouteiller, an agent derivative of bouteille ‘bottle’. This is a common form of the surname in France, while in North America the variants Bouthillier and Boutilier are much more established (and sometimes Americanized as Butler ).

variants.name: Boutilier
meanings: French: variant of   Bouteiller  , in North America altered from   Bouthillier  .

variants.name: Bouthillier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Jacques, Normand, Philippe, Yves.
French: variant of   Bouteiller  . This name is sometimes Americanized as   Butler  . Compare   Boutilier  .

en.lifeSummary: When Raoul I le Bouteiller Senlis Seigneur was born after 1185, in Chaumont-Sud, Chaumont, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Guy IV Senlis de France Bouteiller, was 8839 and his mother, Elisabeth de Trie, was 8830. He married Jeanne de Rougemont after 1205. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1250.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Raoul I le Bouteiller Senlis Seigneur est né après 1185, à Chaumont-Sud, Chaumont, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Guy IV Senlis de France Bouteiller, avait 8839 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth de Trie, avait 8830 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Rougemont après 1205. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1250.

de.lifeSummary: Als Raoul I le Bouteiller Senlis Seigneur nach 1185 in Chaumont-Sud, Chaumont, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy IV Senlis de France Bouteiller 8839 und seine Mutter Elisabeth de Trie 8830. Er hat nach 1205 Jeanne de Rougemont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1250.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul I le Bouteiller Senlis Seigneur è nato il dopo il 1185 nel Chaumont-Sud, Chaumont, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Guy IV Senlis de France Bouteiller, aveva 8839 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth de Trie, aveva 8830 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Rougemont dopo il 1205. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1250.

ja.Chaumont-Sud, Chaumont, Haute-Marne, Cha: フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンハウテ-マルンチャウモントチャウモント-スド
ja.lifeSummary: Raoul I le Bouteiller Senlis Seigneurが1185年以後にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンハウテ-マルンチャウモントチャウモント-スドで生まれた時，父Guy IV Senlis de France Bouteillerは8839歳，母Elisabeth de Trieは8830歳であった。1205年以後にJeanne de Rougemontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1250年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Raoul I le Bouteiller Senlis Seigneur(이)가 1185년 이후 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 하테-마니 차몽 차몽-수드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy IV Senlis de France Bouteiller(은)는 8839세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth de Trie(은)는 8830세였다. 그는 1205년 이후 Jeanne de Rougemont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1250년 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul I le Bouteiller Senlis Seigneur nasceu após 1185, em Chaumont-Sud, Chaumont, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Guy IV Senlis de France Bouteiller, tinha 8839 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth de Trie, tinha 8830 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Rougemont após 1205. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1250.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raoul I le Bouteiller Senlis Seigneur родился после 1185 г. в местности чаумонт-суд, чаумонт, хауте-марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Guy IV Senlis de France Bouteiller было 8839 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth de Trie, 8830. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Rougemont после 1205 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1250 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Raoul I le Bouteiller Senlis Seigneur nació después de 1185, en Chaumont-Sud, Chaumont, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Guy IV Senlis de France Bouteiller, tenía 8839 años y su mamá, Elisabeth de Trie, tenía 8830 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Rougemont después de 1205. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1250.
